title: Summarization & Translation Metrics
content:
# Translation Metrics

## 1. BLEU Equation
$$\text{BLEU} = \text{BP} \cdot \exp\left( \sum_{n=1}^N w_n \ln p_n \right)$$

## 2. Brevity Penalty (BP)
$$\text{BP} = \exp(1 - r/c) \quad (\text{for } c \le r)$$
*   Penalizes short, high-precision candidate sentences.
